title: goodenia subsolana
intro: Goodenia subsolana, also known as the blueberry goodenia, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including the ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Goodenia subsolana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
